V3.2.0: 
- Improved stability. 
 
V3.1.3: 
- Fixed problem of primary data source.

V3.1.1:

- Bug fixes. 
 
V3.1.0: 
- Added currency widget. 
 
V3.0.3: 
- Now stops auto-refresh when app is in background (thus error toast will be suppressed). 
- Fixed a converter page digit layout issue. 
- Added a backup currency rate source to improve stability.
